attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,GLOBAL_NAME
,ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
,DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD
,DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,SALES_ORDER_KEY
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,AR_TRX_KEY
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,PRODUCT_KEY
,DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
,SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
,TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
,MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
,SERVICE_TYPE_CD
,DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD
,WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
,SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
,BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SHIPPED_DT
,CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT
FROM 
(
SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
CASE WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND (NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG='Y' OR NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y') ) THEN CASE WHEN DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN 'As Invoiced-FCM Service' ELSE 'As Invoiced-FCM Product' END
ELSE  'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,/*thvarghe:JUNE-CDR-FY16:Modified for FCM-INV Attributed*/
  /*NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,*/
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  CASE WHEN NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY>0 THEN NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY ELSE COALESCE(SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,SMSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY) END SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 /*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
             ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 
  /*EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
  
  /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
 /*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME in ('WEBEX', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS') /*saransha: Added as part of XAAS Q2FY15 THEN EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ELSE NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
 /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE COALESCE(SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SMSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  SAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
   /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18*/
     /*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
	   CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/
	   /* CSP-MARKETPLACE added :AWS New Batch Source Addition : Q4FY19*/  /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') )  /*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	   )
       THEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
                   ELSE NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
     END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998)
WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(NP2.ITEM_KEY,-998)
ELSE -998 END PRODUCT_KEY,
  -9980  as DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER ELSE COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER ,NSOL_CAL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER ) END  SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE  COALESCE(NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,NSOL_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) END  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE ELSE  COALESCE(NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE ,NSO_CAL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE ) END DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE ELSE  COALESCE(NSOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE ,NSOL_CAL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE ) END SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE ELSE COALESCE(NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,NSO_CAL.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE)  END DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
  CASE WHEN NATL_CBM.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') THEN NCIO_CBM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ELSE NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY END WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ELSE  COALESCE(NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) END SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN SOL.RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE COALESCE(NSOL.RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOL_CAL.RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)  END  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  COALESCE(CAST(COALESCE(NSS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DT,NSS_CAL.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DT) AS DATE) ,  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)) SHIPPED_DT,
  CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
  CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N' 
   END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
     CASE
  WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' OR  ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
  WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM' /*PDUBASI ADDED AS PART OF SEPTEMBER RELEASE CR NOTA FISCAL*/
  WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV'  AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 'DM' 
  WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV'  AND NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 'DM'
  ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  
 /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
  /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE ) 
  /* Commented as part of sales credit implementation*/
  /*INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
   ON( EST.TERRITORY_ID  = NCR.TERRITORY_ID                  
   AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME  =NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
   ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
    AND  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

   
   
 
  /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO
   ON (SMSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID               
   AND SMSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  /*INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON (SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT */
  

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  /* INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL */
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL
   ON (SMSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
   AND SMSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_SHIPMENTS NSS 
   ON (SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )  
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
   ON (SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
 ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
 AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO_CAL
   ON (SMSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID               
   AND SMSO_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
   ON (SMSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL
   ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL_CAL
   ON (SMSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
   AND SMSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_SHIPMENTS NSS_CAL
   ON (SMSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL_CAL
   ON (SMSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */     
  
 LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
 ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
  
/* START : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM Mar 2021 Rel */  
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD,RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE where ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('CBM-OPL-ICMS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') group by 1,2,3)NATL_CBM 
 ON NATL_CBM.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_OPL
 ON (NATL_CBM.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY = NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 AND NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL') 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_OPL
 ON (NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY  = NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND NSO_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL') 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_OPL
 ON (NSOT_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO_CBM
   ON (NSOL_OPL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE= NCIO_CBM.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE)
 /* END : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM Mar 2021 Rel */  
   
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
   ON (COALESCE(NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,NSOL_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)= NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE)
   
   
   
   /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
 ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
/*START:Added as part of FY16-JUNE-CDR:thvarghe*/

 /*SIGORANT:Modified as part of Q2FY18 SOT change*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL
  ON NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  SO
  ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
  
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_LINE  SOL
 ON NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  = SOL.EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO  SO
 ON SOL.EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SO_KEY= SO.EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SO_KEY    */  
LEFT JOIN (SELECT BK_DEAL_ID FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FCM_DEAL_MAPPING GROUP BY 1) NFDM
 ON NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID=CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/
 /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') )/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 )
 /* CSP-MARKETPLACE added :AWS New Batch Source Addition : Q4FY19*/ )
  THEN  SO.BK_DEAL_ID ELSE NSO. BK_DEAL_ID END
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_HEAD_EXT ERP
 ON (ERP.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND ERP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )  
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EL_TRX
 ON NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EL_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME 
/*END:Added as part of FY16-JUNE-CDR:thvarghe*/
 /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
 ON (NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
 /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
 ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  
           THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
           ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 
 /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
 ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
 ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME/*( 
 CASE WHEN NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME=STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME THEN STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME ELSE 'UNITED STATES' END )existing logic in Q1FY14 webex saas RELEASE is commented due to duplicate issues*/ 
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
 ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))/*added as a part of Q3FY14 Release*/
 /*AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME   : COMMENTED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
 /*prbobba : added for Q1FY15*/
   
 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
 AND (  SMSO.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSO_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR NSO_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL  )
 AND (  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL     OR NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IS NOT NULL OR NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IS NOT NULL )
 AND (  NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME IS NOT NULL OR  NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL OR  NSOT_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL )
 AND (  SMSOL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL  OR SMSOL_CAL.SS_CODE  IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE  IS NOT NULL )
 AND (  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  OR NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL )
 
 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
CASE WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND (NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG='Y' OR NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y') ) THEN CASE WHEN DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN 'As Invoiced-FCM Service' ELSE 'As Invoiced-FCM Product' END
ELSE  'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,/*thvarghe:JUNE-CDR-FY16:Modified for FCM-INV Attributed*/
 /*NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
 NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,*/
 NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
 NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 CASE WHEN NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY>0 THEN NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY ELSE COALESCE(SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,SMSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY) END   SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
 NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 
 /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 /*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
             ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 
 /*EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
  /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
 /*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME in ('WEBEX', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') THEN EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ELSE NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
 NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
/* ADDED AS A PART OF CDC Q4FY18 */
 CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' THEN -7777
      WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CDC' THEN -4444
      END  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 SAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
 /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18*/
     /*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/ 
	 CASE WHEN ((ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ('XAAS%') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') )/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	 )
	 /* CSP-MARKETPLACE added :AWS New Batch Source Addition : Q4FY19*/)
       THEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
                   ELSE NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
     END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998)
WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(NP2.ITEM_KEY,-998)
ELSE -998 END PRODUCT_KEY,
 -9980 as DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
 CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) as SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
/* ADDED AS A PART OF CDC Q4FY18 */
 CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' THEN -7777
      WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CDC' THEN -4444
      END  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , /* in sales order line, it is declared as -9999*/
 COALESCE(NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,NSO_CAL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE)  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
 CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(32) ) as SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 COALESCE(NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE , NSO_CAL.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE) DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
 -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,

 NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT,
 CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
  CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N' 
   END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
     CASE
  WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%'  OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
  WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM' /*PDUBASI ADDED AS PART OF SEPTEMBER RELEASE CR NOTA FISCAL*/
  WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV'  AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 'DM' 
  WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV'  AND NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 'DM'

SELECT	RT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID , NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE , NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ,
CASE 
WHEN	COALESCE( SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) IS NULL THEN 
CASE	WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'QTC' THEN - 9999 
WHEN	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN - 8888 
WHEN    NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CDC' THEN - 4444 
ELSE	- 7777 
END	ELSE COALESCE( SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SLS_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
END	AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
CASE	WHEN COALESCE( SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SLS_OPL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) IS NULL THEN 
	CASE	WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'QTC' THEN - 9999 
			WHEN	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN - 8888 
			WHEN    NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CDC' THEN - 4444 
	ELSE	- 7777 END	
ELSE COALESCE( SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SLS_OPL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
END	AS RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
(CASE WHEN RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN NP.ITEM_KEY WHEN RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN NP2.ITEM_KEY ELSE -997 END) AS ITEM_KEY ,
COALESCE( SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE, SLS_OPL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ,'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
COALESCE( ORG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE ,'UNK' ) AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE , 
COALESCE( SLS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM ,SLS_CAL.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,SLS_OPL.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM  ) , 
COALESCE( ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ,- 999 ) AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY , 
NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME , 
COALESCE( ESOT.NAME ,ESOT_CAL.NAME ,ESOT_OPL.NAME, 'UNK' ) AS NAME , 
COALESCE( SLS_V1.DISPATCH_DTM ,SLS_V1_CAL.DISPATCH_DTM,SLS_V1_OPL.DISPATCH_DTM ) , 
ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT ,
COALESCE( SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE , SLS_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE, SLS_OPL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ) , 
X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY AS MTL_INV_ORG_KEY ,
X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY AS MTL_ITEM_KEY , 
X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS MTL_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY ,
X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CODE , 
X.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME ,
X.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME , 
BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY , 
ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ,
ORG.CG1_FLG 
,CASE WHEN (RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND (NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL OR SLS_V1.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD in ('ELECTRONIC','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIVERY','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIV'))) OR 
		(RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND (NP2.ITEM_KEY IS NULL OR SLS_V1.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD in ('ELECTRONIC','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIVERY','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIV')))  
		THEN 'UNKNOWN'   
ELSE 
		CASE WHEN X.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD' THEN
			CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold' AND X.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_33'
			WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'COST OF GOODS SOLD' AND X.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008'
                    ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
                    END
		WHEN ORG.EP_AB_BOM_COGS_CALC_ENBLD_FLG= 'Y' THEN                            
			CASE WHEN SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD'  THEN 
				CASE WHEN X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN
					CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='COST OF GOODS SOLD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008' ELSE 'MTL_TRX_33' END
				ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
				END
			ELSE 
			CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' END
			END
		ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
		END 
END
AS LINE_FLG_CD /* sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of Q1FY15  Changes end as part of Q1FY15*/  , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP( 0 ) (NAMED CREATE_DATETIME ) 

FROM	$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG RT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON	RT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT

AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  AND  RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
    ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
    AND  RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

LEFT OUTER JOIN /* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL  SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SS_CODE,BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME

) NSO 
ON	NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID 
AND	NSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT

AND	ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS 
ON	RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS.SS_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN /* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL  SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SS_CODE,BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) NSO_OPL 
ON	NSO_OPL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID 
AND	NSO_OPL.SS_CODE = 'OPL' 

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS_OPL
 ON RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS_OPL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND SLS_OPL.SS_CODE = 'OPL'

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1_OPL

 AND SLS_V1_OPL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SEL ESOT_OPL.NAME FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT_OPL WHERE GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG') ESOT_OPL
 ON	ESOT_OPL.NAME = NSO_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
 AND NSO_OPL.SS_CODE = 'OPL' 
 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1 
ON	SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND	SLS_V1.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME 
ON	EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT.ORG_ID 
AND	EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN /* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL
SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
SS_CODE,
BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) NSO_CAL 
ON	NSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID 
AND	NSO_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT_CAL 
ON	ESOT_CAL.NAME = NSO_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
AND	ESOT_CAL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS_CAL 
ON	RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS_CAL.SS_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1_CAL 
ON	SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND	SLS_V1_CAL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG 
ON	COALESCE( SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SLS_OPL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ) = ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM_LNK 
ON	COALESCE( SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_OPL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) = BOM_LNK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND	COALESCE( SLS.PRODUCT_KEY , SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY ) = BOM_LNK.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY 
AND	BOM_LNK.PROCESS_STATUS_CD = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN BOM 
ON	CAST( TRIM ( COALESCE( SLS.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT , SLS_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ) ) || '-' || TRIM ( COALESCE( SLS.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,
SLS_CAL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ) )  AS VARCHAR ( 50 )  ) = BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 
AND	COALESCE( SLS.PRODUCT_KEY , SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY ) = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY 
AND	ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
SELECT	MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY , MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY ,
MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME ,
MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME , TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ,MTL1.SS_CD

FROM	$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG RT1 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1 
ON	RT1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME 

 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
 ON(NP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 AND       RT1.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
 ON (RT1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
    AND RT1.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
                
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
        ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
     AND  RT1.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')

LEFT OUTER JOIN /* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,SS_CODE,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD' 
) SLS1 
ON	RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS1.SS_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1_OPL
 ON RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1_OPL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND SLS1_OPL.SS_CODE ='OPL'

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME 
ON	EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT1.ORG_ID 
AND	EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN /* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL
SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,SS_CODE,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD' 
) SLS1_CAL 
ON	RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG1 
ON	COALESCE( SLS1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , SLS1_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE, SLS1_OPL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ) = ORG1.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE 

INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL1 
ON	MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
AND	MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY = COALESCE(NP1.ITEM_KEY,NP2.ITEM_KEY)
AND	MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = COALESCE( SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,SLS1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS1_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 

INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE MTL_TYPE1 
ON	MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME 

INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET1 
ON	TRX_DET1.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL1.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY 

left join $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV
on EV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = TRX_DET1.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

WHERE	1 = 1 
AND	( ( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Cost of Goods Sold'
AND TRX_DET1.SS_CD <>'ERPCLOUD' ) 
OR	( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold' 
AND TRX_DET1.SS_CD <>'ERPCLOUD') 
/*Added for CBM AUG FY23*/
OR	( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold' 
AND TRX_DET1.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD'
and EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = 12190
 and EV.BK_COMPANY_CODE='020'
) 
OR	( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Cost of Goods Sold'
and TRX_DET1.SS_CD='ERPCLOUD' 
and EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = 50100
 and EV.BK_COMPANY_CODE='020') /*Added for CBM AUG FY23*/
) 
/*AND	COALESCE( SLS1.ITEM_TYPE_CODE , SLS1_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ) = 'STANDARD'  Commented and moved to Derived table*/
AND	( SLS1.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL 
OR	SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR	SLS1_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL ) 

QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY ,MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY , MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
ORDER	BY MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME , MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME , TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC ) = 1 
) X 
ON	X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
AND	X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY = COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,NP2.ITEM_KEY) 
AND	X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = COALESCE( SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SLS_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 

WHERE	NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH 
WHERE	RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID 
AND	RT.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
/* AND  BOM_LNK.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY NOT IN ('271689806') */  /*Abort Fix 02-02-2019*/

UNION  ALL 



SELECT	RT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID , NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE , NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ,
CASE 
WHEN	COALESCE( SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) IS NULL THEN 
CASE	WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'QTC' THEN - 9999 
WHEN	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN - 8888 
WHEN    NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CDC' THEN - 4444 
ELSE	- 7777 
END	ELSE COALESCE( SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SLS_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
END	AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
CASE	WHEN COALESCE( SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SLS_OPL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) IS NULL THEN 
CASE	WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'QTC' THEN - 9999 
WHEN	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN - 8888 
WHEN    NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'CDC' THEN - 4444 
ELSE	- 7777 
END	ELSE COALESCE( SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SLS_OPL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
END	AS RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
(CASE WHEN RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN NP.ITEM_KEY WHEN RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN NP2.ITEM_KEY ELSE -997 END) AS ITEM_KEY ,
COALESCE( SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE, SLS_OPL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ,'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
COALESCE( ORG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE ,'UNK' ) AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE , 
COALESCE( SLS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM ,SLS_CAL.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,SLS_OPL.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM ) , 
COALESCE( ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ,- 999 ) AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY , 
NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME , COALESCE( ESOT.NAME ,ESOT_CAL.NAME,ESOT_OPL.NAME , 'UNK' ) AS NAME , 
COALESCE( SLS_V1.DISPATCH_DTM ,SLS_V1_CAL.DISPATCH_DTM,SLS_V1_OPL.DISPATCH_DTM ) , 
ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT ,
COALESCE( SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE , SLS_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE, SLS_OPL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ) , 
X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY AS MTL_INV_ORG_KEY ,
X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY AS MTL_ITEM_KEY , 
X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS MTL_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY ,
X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CODE , X.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME ,
X.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME , BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY , ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ,
ORG.CG1_FLG 
,CASE WHEN (RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND (NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL OR SLS_V1.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD in ('ELECTRONIC','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIVERY','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIV'))) OR 
		(RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND (NP2.ITEM_KEY IS NULL OR SLS_V1.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD in ('ELECTRONIC','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIVERY','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIV')))  
		THEN 'UNKNOWN'   
ELSE 
		CASE WHEN X.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD' THEN
			CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold' AND X.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_33'
			WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'COST OF GOODS SOLD' AND X.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008'
                    ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
                    END
		WHEN ORG.EP_AB_BOM_COGS_CALC_ENBLD_FLG= 'Y' THEN                            
			CASE WHEN SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD'  THEN 
				CASE WHEN X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN
					CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='COST OF GOODS SOLD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008' ELSE 'MTL_TRX_33' END
				ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
				END
			ELSE 
			CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' END
			END
		ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
		END 
END
AS LINE_FLG_CD /* sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of Q1FY15 Changes end as part of Q1FY15*/ 
 , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP( 0 ) (NAMED CREATE_DATETIME ) 

FROM	$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG RT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON	RT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT

AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  AND  RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
     and RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
   ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
    AND  RT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO 
ON	NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID 
AND	NSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT 
ON	ESOT.NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
AND	ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS 
ON	RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS.SS_CODE 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1 
ON	SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND	SLS_V1.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN /* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL  SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SS_CODE,BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) NSO_OPL 
ON	NSO_OPL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID 
AND	NSO_OPL.SS_CODE = 'OPL' 

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS_OPL
 ON RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS_OPL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND SLS_OPL.SS_CODE = 'OPL'

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1_OPL
 ON SLS_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SLS_V1_OPL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SEL ESOT_OPL.NAME FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT_OPL WHERE GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG') ESOT_OPL
 ON	ESOT_OPL.NAME = NSO_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
 AND NSO_OPL.SS_CODE = 'OPL' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME 
ON	EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT.ORG_ID 
AND	EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL 
ON	NSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID 
AND	NSO_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT_CAL 
ON	ESOT_CAL.NAME = NSO_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
AND	ESOT_CAL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL_GNAME.ORIG_GLOBAL_NAME 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS_CAL 
ON	RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS_CAL.SS_CODE 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1_CAL 
ON	SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND	SLS_V1_CAL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG 
ON	COALESCE( SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ) = ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM_LNK 
ON	COALESCE( SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) = BOM_LNK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND	COALESCE( SLS.PRODUCT_KEY , SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY ) = BOM_LNK.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY 
AND	BOM_LNK.PROCESS_STATUS_CD = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN BOM 
ON	CAST( TRIM ( COALESCE( SLS.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT , SLS_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ) ) 
|| '-' || TRIM ( COALESCE( SLS.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT , SLS_CAL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ) )  AS VARCHAR ( 50 )  ) = BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 
AND	COALESCE( SLS.PRODUCT_KEY , SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY ) = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY 
AND	ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 


LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
SELECT	MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY , MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY ,
MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME ,
MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME , TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ,MTL1.SS_CD

FROM	$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG RT1 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1 
ON	RT1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
 ON(NP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 AND       RT1.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
 ON (RT1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
    AND RT1.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
                
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
        ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
     AND  RT1.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
 

LEFT OUTER JOIN/* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL
SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,SS_CODE,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD'
) SLS1 
ON	RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS1.SS_CODE 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1_OPL
 ON RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID  = SLS1_OPL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
 AND SLS1_OPL.SS_CODE ='OPL'

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME 
ON	EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT1.ORG_ID 
AND	EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN/* Modified to Derived Table */
(
SEL
SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,SS_CODE,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD'
)SLS1_CAL 
ON	RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
AND	EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG1 
ON	COALESCE( SLS1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , SLS1_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ) = ORG1.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE 

INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL1 
ON	MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
AND	MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY = COALESCE(NP1.ITEM_KEY,NP2.ITEM_KEY)
AND	MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = COALESCE( SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,SLS1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 

INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE MTL_TYPE1 
ON	MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET1 
ON	TRX_DET1.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL1.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY 
left join $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV
on EV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = TRX_DET1.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

WHERE	1 = 1 
AND	( ( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Cost of Goods Sold'
AND TRX_DET1.SS_CD <>'ERPCLOUD' ) 
OR	( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold' 
AND TRX_DET1.SS_CD <>'ERPCLOUD') 
/*Added for CBM AUG FY23*/
OR	( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold' 
AND TRX_DET1.SS_CD ='ERPCLOUD'
and EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = 12190
 and EV.BK_COMPANY_CODE='020'
) 
OR	( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue' 
AND	MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order' 
AND	TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'Cost of Goods Sold'
and TRX_DET1.SS_CD='ERPCLOUD' 
and EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = 50100
 and EV.BK_COMPANY_CODE='020') /*Added for CBM AUG FY23*/
)
/*AND	COALESCE( SLS1.ITEM_TYPE_CODE , SLS1_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ) = 'STANDARD'  commented */
AND	( SLS1.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL 
OR	SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR	SLS1_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL ) 

QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY ,
MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY , MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
ORDER	BY MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME , MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME , TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC ) = 1 ) X 
ON	X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
AND	X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY = COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,NP2.ITEM_KEY)   
AND	X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = COALESCE( SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
WHERE	EXISTS ( 
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH 
WHERE	RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID 
AND	RT.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT 
 TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ,
 GLOBAL_NAME ,
 GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT ,
 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
 DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
 DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
 ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
 FROM (
SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  COALESCE(CAST(
  (CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN 
   CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
      THEN 1.000000
      ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
         END) 
   AS DECIMAL(26,7))
   ELSE NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
  END)* COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
  CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
  CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
  CAST(
  COALESCE(
  (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
   CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN
    CAST
    ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
      WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
       CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
       ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
       END 
      ELSE 0.0000000
     END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
    CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
    COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
   ELSE 0.0000000
   END
  END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 COALESCE(CAST(
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
   THEN 0.0000000 
   ELSE ( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
        THEN CASE  /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation
            WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
            */
            WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_OPL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit' 
              OR
              (UPPER(COALESCE(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME,NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME)) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE) ='RETURN')) 
            THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY /*OAQ1FY15 */
            ELSE 0.0000000
          END
        ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
      END) 
 END *  ( CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN (ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000) * WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT ELSE WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT END)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)      DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 
/* :pvenketa DEFAULTING ICMS-ADJ TO ZERO AS PART OF Q1FY15 BY SC-LSS*/
COALESCE(CAST(
 CASE WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
 CASE WHEN NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE '%CBM-OPL-CLOUD%'  /*CBM CHANGES JUNE 2022*/
         AND ORD_LN_V.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME IN('Loan Invoice Only','Loan Return','Return for Credit', 'Return for Inspection', 
         'RMA Advance Replacement', 'RMA No Defect Found', 'RMA Repair', 'RMA Replacement') THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
 CASE WHEN ((NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE '%ICMS-ADJ%' OR  NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))   
 THEN 0.0000000  ELSE
 CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
   (CAST( WDNRTSC.DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT 
   * 
   WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7))* 
   COALESCE(CAST(NATLGD.COGS_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
 WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 0.0000000
 WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 0.0000000
 ELSE 0.0000000
 END
 end 
 END
 END AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
/*END OF CHANGES FOR ICMS-ADJ*/
  CASE WHEN  ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')))

  AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL' AND  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 0 
   ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY END   DV_EXTENDED_QTY , 
   /* OA Q1FY15 >> */
  CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN EL.ATTRIBUTE8 ELSE 100.0000000 END as ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT, 
 CASE WHEN NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y' THEN 
(CAST( COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOL_OPL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) /*knarlapu:/(case when (DV_EXTENDED_QTY) = 0.0000000 then 1.0000000 else ABS(DV_EXTENDED_QTY) end )*/ AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
 ELSE 
 CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN (
 CAST( ((ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000)* NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)/*knarlapu:/(case when (DV_EXTENDED_QTY) = 0.0000000 then 1.0000000 else ABS(DV_EXTENDED_QTY) end )*/ AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
 ELSE COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOL_OPL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) END END as UNIT_PRICE,
 /* << OA Q1FY15 */
 CAST(COALESCE(CAST(CAST( 
 (
  CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
    THEN CASE /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation
        NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
        */
        WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_OPL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit' 
           OR
          (UPPER(COALESCE(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME,NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME)) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE) ='RETURN'))
        /* rivijay: commented to use top SKU qty
		THEN WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY */
		THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
		
        ELSE 0.0000000
      END
	  /* rivijay: commented to use top SKU qty 
    ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  */
	ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
  END
 ) *
 ( CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_OPL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'Trade-In Return' 
    THEN 0.0000000 
    ELSE /* commented for OA Q1FY15 CAST(COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOLN_CAL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) AS DECIMAL(26,7))*/
    CAST(UNIT_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7))
  END
 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7))

 CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000)

   CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN

         ELSE

       (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1

   ELSE 0.0000000 
   END
  END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,

		  
COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100 * 
 COALESCE( CAST( /*CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7))*/
 (CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1

 (CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1

 ELSE WDNRTBP.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE END)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)     ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT

           */
             WHEN (Coalesce(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME)  = 'RMA with Credit' 
              OR
             (Upper(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN')
			 OR  BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') OR NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN 'XAAS'
			 )
           THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
               THEN Coalesce(Cast(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
               ELSE Coalesce(Cast(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
             END
           WHEN ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') /*AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN  ('XAAS')*/
		   )) 
		   AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ 
		   Upper(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'
           THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
               THEN Coalesce(Cast(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
               ELSE Coalesce(Cast(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) 
             END
           ELSE 0.0000000
         END
       ELSE CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
           THEN Coalesce(Cast(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
           ELSE Coalesce(Cast(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
         END
       END
    )
    *( CASE  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' 
       THEN Cast((Cast(Coalesce(Cast(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) 
             * 
             (Coalesce(Cast(NATLGD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100) / 
					( /*OA Q2FY15*/
	CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN

    ELSE 1
    END
) AS DECIMAL(26,7)
		)

		  OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ )

             THEN 100.0000000

            * 
            ( CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' 
			OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ )
               THEN Coalesce(Cast(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
               WHEN ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' ,'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') /*AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')*/
			   ))
               THEN 100.0000000
               ELSE 100.0000000
             END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)
         )
       ELSE 100.0000000
     END)
   END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) END
 XAAS_TRXN_QTY

CASE WHEN COALESCE(((CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_OPL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'Trade-In Return' AND UPPER(COALESCE(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) <> 'MIXED')

 (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,

 ON(MAX_DATE.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID

  AND MAX_DATE.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY

0 USD_BASE_PRICE,

WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
		WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
		AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
    CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
--		 (CASE WHEN  NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') THEN Cast(Coalesce(SOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0)*Coalesce(Cast((Cast(Cast(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE) -  Cast(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,1) ),1)
		 --*Coalesce(Cast(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0) AS DECIMAL(26,7))

		 /*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
		 
		 
			(CASE	
			  WHEN NP.RU_SBSCRPTN_OFFR_TYPE_CD='Success_Track_Sub' and SOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT>1  
			         THEN 
				          Cast(NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT/ Coalesce(SOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1)  AS  DECIMAL(26,7))  
						  
			  WHEN NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY>0 THEN 
			  CAST((COALESCE(NPPT.BASE_PRICE,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 
                                                 ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			  WHEN NPPT_DEF.PRODUCT_KEY>0 THEN 
			  CAST( (COALESCE(NPPT.LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			  ELSE 0 
	     END)
	   * CASE WHEN NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='Amortized One Time' 
		   THEN CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
		   ELSE    		
			   	 CASE WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Monthly Billing' THEN 1
                      WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Annual Billing' THEN 12
	                  WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Quarterly Billing' THEN 3
	                  WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME IN ('Prepaid Term','UNKNOWN') THEN 
							(CASE WHEN (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT IS NULL) OR (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT=0 ) THEN 1 ELSE NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT END)
				 END  
		 END	
	ELSE 0
	END
    USD_BASE_PRICE,
	
    CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN
  CAST( (COALESCE(SOL.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			 	 
	ELSE 0
	END  ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
  
  COALESCE(CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN
  CAST( (COALESCE(SOL.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
			 	   * CASE WHEN NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='Amortized One Time' 
		   THEN CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
		   ELSE    		
			   	 CASE WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Monthly Billing' THEN 1
                      WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Annual Billing' THEN 12
	                  WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Quarterly Billing' THEN 3
	                  WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME IN ('Prepaid Term','UNKNOWN') THEN 
							(CASE WHEN (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT IS NULL) OR (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT=0 ) THEN 1 ELSE NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT END)
				 END 
		 	END
	ELSE 0
	END,0)  ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
    FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG NCR
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
     ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
     AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SATL.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
	INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
     ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON NP.ITEM_KEY=NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (select * from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE where line_status_cd<>'Deleted') SOL
    ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
	LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV) NSOLV
    ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
    ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
	
	/*
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
  ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
  */
	
  
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_PRDT_PRC_TV NPPT
    ON(    
	   NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
	   AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = SO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME
	   AND NPPT.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT=SOL.PRICE_VERSION_NUM_INT 
         AND NPPT.PLAN_TYPE_NM=coalesce(SOL.CONFIG_PRC_QUOTE_PLAN_NM ,'UNKNOWN') 
	   AND  NPPT.PRICING_FORMULA_CD<>'Rate Table')
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_PRDT_PRC_TV NPPT_DEF
    ON(    
	   NPPT_DEF.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
	   AND NPPT_DEF.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT=SOL.PRICE_VERSION_NUM_INT
	   AND NPPT_DEF.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Global Price List - US' 
          AND NPPT_DEF.PLAN_TYPE_NM=coalesce(SOL.CONFIG_PRC_QUOTE_PLAN_NM ,'UNKNOWN') 
	   AND NPPT_DEF.PRICING_FORMULA_CD<>'Rate Table')
	LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPTB
  ON(NPPTB.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  AND CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPTB.START_TV_DATE AND NPPTB.END_TV_DATE
  AND NPPTB.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List') 
	   
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME) 
   AND (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') 
   /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
   OR (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE  ('XAAS%') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
   --OR (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND  NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') 
   ) /*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
   AND  NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS')

 ON( ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID                            
 AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )*/

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL

 AND ELSALER.GLOBAL_NAME =  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT
EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
EL.DV_ORDER_LINE_ID AS DV_ORDER_LINE_ID,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
CASE WHEN NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE=0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))
	 WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM')
	 THEN CAST(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT/NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7))
	 WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM')
	 THEN CAST(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT/NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7))
	 ELSE 0
END 
TRX_ORD_LN_PCT,
CAST(
(CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM')
     THEN NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY
	 ELSE NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY END ) *
COALESCE(NSPA.ADJSTD_USD_AMT,0) * TRX_ORD_LN_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_PURC_ADJ_PCT_AMT
FROM
(SELECT CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG GROUP BY 1,2,3) NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL
ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME=EL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND NATIL.SS_CODE=EL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
 ON(SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON ( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
  ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON (NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=EL.DV_ORDER_LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=EL.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT NSPA
ON NSPA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSPA.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_DESCR='Purchase Adjustment'  AND NSPA.SS_CD<>'OPL'

SELECT
  FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG  ,              
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT   ,  
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE BK_SS_CD     ,                 
  AMT.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    , 
  AMT.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
  AMT.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,   
  KEY1.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD     ,         
  KEY1.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  ,          
  KEY2.LINE_TYPE_CD  ,                
  NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT SPLIT_PCT  ,                   
  CAST(NCR.GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_DTM   ,                     
  CAST(NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_POSTED_DTM   ,              
  CAST(NCR.RULE_START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RULE_START_DTM  ,              
  CASE WHEN NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG = 'F' THEN 'FORWARD' ELSE 'REVERSE' END FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
  NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG LAST_RECORD_FLG,         
  KEY1.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD    ,    
  KEY1.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD    , 
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   , 
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,    
  'FOR REVENUE REPORTING'  REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE     ,       
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_KEY    ,           
  KEY1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
  KEY1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
  KEY1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,         
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,        
  KEY2.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
  KEY1.AR_TRX_KEY  ,                  
  KEY1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
  NCR.ORDER_NUMBER REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
  KEY1.PRODUCT_KEY   ,                
  KEY2.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD   ,      
  FLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG    ,            
  (CASE WHEN ( FLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' 
     /* AND FLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG = 'N' */   /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */  
     /* AND FLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'N'  */   /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */  
    /* AND FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' */  /*satchinn: Commented as part   corp revenue flag changes  */
     /*AND FLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG = 'N'*//*pdubasi: commented the condition DV_CHARGES_FLG='N' as part of Q4FY14 LSS Release*/
     AND FLAG.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP = 'Y'
    )
   THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' 
   END
  ) DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
  FLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG    , 
  FLAG.DV_MISC_FLG   ,                
  FLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,      
  FLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    ,         
  FLAG.DV_SERVICE_FLG  ,              
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   ,   
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  ,
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT  ,         
  AMT.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   ,            
  KEY1.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY     ,
  FLAG.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG   ,       
  KEY1.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM    ,      
  KEY1.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
  KEY1.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
  KEY1.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT,                  
  KEY2.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD    ,       
  KEY2.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
  KEY2.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME   ,     
  KEY2.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,     
  FLAG.MAJOR_LINE_FLG   ,             
  KEY1.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
  KEY1.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  KEY1.SERVICE_TYPE_CD    ,           
  KEY1.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT, 
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT   ,      
  KEY2.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT   ,  
  KEY1.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD   ,    
  KEY1.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
  KEY2.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,       
  KEY2.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY    ,       
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,      
  KEY2.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD      ,      
  KEY1.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , 
  KEY2.SALES_REP_NUM     ,            
  CASE WHEN NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE = 'O' THEN  NCR.GL_DT  ELSE CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)  END DV_FISCAL_DT  ,
  NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
  NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
  NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  COALESCE(EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY , -995 )as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  COALESCE(SORR.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  NCR.AMOUNT  ,
  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
  NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
  AMT.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
  AMT.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG  NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_KEY1_CG KEY1
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY1.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_KEY2_CG KEY2
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY2.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY2.GLOBAL_NAME)  
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_FLAG_CG FLAG
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = FLAG.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = FLAG.GLOBAL_NAME) 
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_AMOUNT_CG AMT
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = AMT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AMT.GLOBAL_NAME)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (
   SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,
   ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
    ON    (        
             ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
    )  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1
  )EVNGLA 
   ON ( EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
 AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR
   ON NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME
   WHERE NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC'

SELECT
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE_CD  ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
SMGLDT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
/*NAPC.SK_GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT   , */
-999 AS SK_GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
/*modified for Q1fy15 PRBOBBA*/
/*CASE WHEN EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT   IN ( 'WEBEX' , 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS')*//*saransha: Added as part of XAAS Q2FY15*/ /* THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
ELSE NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER END SALES_REP_NUM,*/
NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN        
 CASE WHEN ( SUBSTR(SORR.NAME,1,8)='VARIABLE' OR UPPER(SORR.NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) THEN 'GL' ELSE  'INV_GL' END                
WHEN  NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'INV' THEN 'INV'
ELSE  'ADJ' END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
NCR.Account_code FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT   INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME     
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RT_CG NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
 ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
   ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE  SATL
 ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT
 ON ( EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME  = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
 ON(EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME  =NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
 ON( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = EORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
 AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT = EORCT.ORG_ID )
/* Commented as part of sales credit implementation*/ 
/*INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
 ON( ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID                            
 AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR      
 ON  (SORR.RULE_ID =NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
 AND SORR.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA
 ON ( EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
 AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)*/
 
 INNER JOIN (
   SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,
   ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
    ON    (        
             ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
    )  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1
  )ENGLA 
   ON ( ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
 AND  ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SMGLDT
 ON (SMGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
 AND SMGLDT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
 ON (NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  = SMGLDT.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  )
 WHERE NCR.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC'

 ON (NAPC.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY=NATLGD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY ) */
